place: Plai Laem, Bo Phut, Ko Samui District, Surat Thani 84320, Thailand
title: Hillside Estate Villa with 25m Infinity Pool, Commercial Gym & Cinema - Plai Laem
blurb: An extraordinary seven-bedroom hillside estate on Koh Samui's north-eastern coast, built for gatherings on a grand scale — one of the island's largest infinity pools at 25 metres, a commercial-grade gym, a private cinema and a games room, with panoramic ocean views and seven en-suite bedrooms, five with their own jacuzzis.
detail:
Perched majestically on the hillside above Koh Samui's north-eastern coastline, this contemporary seven-bedroom estate takes villa living to a whole new level — panoramic ocean views, one of the island's largest infinity pools, and grand entertaining spaces in a setting that feels both secluded and connected, minutes from the island's beaches, restaurants and nightlife.

The centrepiece is a 25-metre infinity-edge pool wrapped by expansive decks, a rooftop sun deck and landscaped gardens — endless room for lazy afternoons in the sun and sunset dinners beneath the stars. Open-plan lounges and dining areas form a welcoming heart, while multiple pavilions and quiet corners let guests gather together or slip away for privacy. Each of the seven en-suite bedrooms is a private sanctuary — five with their own jacuzzis — finished with elegant materials, generous layouts and terrace or balcony access.

The villa is built for sociable living: a commercial-grade gym with professional equipment, a private cinema, and a games room with pool table, table football, table tennis, retro arcade, PlayStation, Xbox and Wii. Beyond, a practice basketball court, an outdoor trampoline, a yoga pavilion, a massage sala and meditation nests. A centralised sound system, full-service kitchen, poolside BBQ and sunset cocktail deck complete the picture, with seven king bedrooms sleeping fourteen adults (extra bed and crib available).

A resident team looks after the stay, with a full-service kitchen, private underground parking, full backup generators and uniformed security — a turn-key estate for a large family or group seeking space, privacy and resort-grade facilities steps from the sea.
